markdown:
#  Navigate to a Company from Your Free Procore Account 
##### Limited Release
[Free Procore accounts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/create-a-free-procore-company-account) are currently only available in the United States and Canada.
##  Background 
If you are already logged in to your free Procore account and need to navigate to another company's account in Procore's, you can quickly navigate to that company from your account.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Log in to your free Procore account.
  2. Click the **Projects** tool.
  3. From the drop-down menu, select the **company** you want to navigate to.  
![Clipboard Ef5ccbf0618561b724054c409e532d173](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/535e3ab9805f548ba04da547f0739b44/aeccc533eb0cd16f42d67cebbeae06e4/clipboard_ef5ccbf0618561b724054c409e532d173.png?fm=webp&h=143)
  4. Click **View Company**.  
This automatically opens the company's Portfolio page in Procore's web application where you can see projects that you are associated with.


## See Also
  * [View Projects from Your Free Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/view-projects-from-your-free-procore-account)
  * [Indicate Your Intention to Bid from your Free Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/indicate-your-intention-to-bid-from-your-free-procore-account)
  * [Navigate to a Project from Your Free Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/navigate-to-a-project-from-your-free-procore-account)
title: Navigate to a Company from Your Free Procore Account
description: How to navigate to a collaborator company's account from your free Procore account.
